name: Danganronpa RPG
description:
16 Highschoolers were chosen as "Ultimates", and enrolled in a school called "Blue Sky Academy". Little did these students know, despair was just around the corner. Waking up with absolutely no memories of how they got there, the students were trapped within a facility, where they couldn't escape. The only way to escape would be to graduate. And to graduate, you'd need to kill another one of your peers, and get away with it. Will you clasp onto hope, or fall into despair? 

FINISHED!
creator: fgthegoat
